name: Volli Marysville Event Center & Sports Bar
about: Volli Marysville Event Center & Sports Bar is an indoor entertainment venue that combines golf simulation with food, drinks, and other recreational activities. The facility features a state-of-the-art golf simulator where players can virtually play some of the world's best golf courses. It operates as a sports bar environment, offering a full menu of food and beverages. The venue caters to both casual players and those looking for structured events, leagues, and group packages. With a focus on year-round play regardless of weather, it provides a multi-use space for sports, socializing, and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulator allows play in any weather
Virtual access to world's best golf courses
Full-service bar and food available on-site
Part of a larger entertainment venue with other activities
Available for leagues and group events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with satisfying sandwiches, flatbreads, and chicken wings.
Full bar with local brews, wines, and ice-cold beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulator, specific model not detailed

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice for players to bring their own clubs. Club rentals may be available but are not confirmed in the provided information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted. They offer a full menu of sandwiches, flatbreads, chicken wings, local brews, wines, and other beverages.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for 18 holes. The duration would depend on the simulator setup and the number of people in your group, which is typically up to 6 people per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is marketed as a family-friendly center with an 'ALL AGES WELCOME' policy. It offers a variety of activities like cornhole and pickleball that are suitable for children, in addition to golf.
